cases.title: Attended participant submits feedback after event completion within feedback window
preconditions: Event in Completed state with active feedback window (current time between feedbackOpenAt and feedbackCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Attended state for the event
Authenticated Participant actor submitting for own registration
steps: Invoke feedbackService.submit(eventId, participantId, { answers: { q1: 5, q2: "Great session" } }, participantContext)
Query persisted feedback row linked to registrationId
Verify FeedbackSubmitted domain event emitted
cases.expected: Submission succeeds with feedbackId and submittedAt per AC-08a; answers persisted on Registration 1-to-0..1 Feedback relationship; aligns with testing-plan §3 row: Feedback in allowed window → accepted (AC-08, BR-15)

cases.title: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback returns HTTP 200 with feedbackId and submittedAt
preconditions: E2E fixture event in Completed state with feedback window active
Participant JWT for Attended registration on the event
Request body includes registrationId and non-empty answers object
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with Authorization bearer token and body { registrationId, answers: { q1: 5, q2: "Excellent session" } }
Verify HTTP status code and response payload fields per API design §4
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with feedbackId (UUID) and submittedAt (ISO-8601) per AC-08a; participant can submit feedback via public API after event within allowed window

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle feedback step succeeds after event completion
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through draft, publish, registration, check-in, and event completion
Participant Attended with feedback window open post-event
Participant token from prior flow steps
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with participant token and answers payload after complete transition
Confirm submittedAt is present in response
cases.expected: Feedback accepted within window per AC-08a; Flow A proceeds from check-in through post-event feedback submission without blocking on participant submit failure

cases.title: Participant submits feedback via UI after event when window is open
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on a Completed event
Feedback window is currently open post-event
Event detail or my registrations page exposes feedback submission UI
steps: Navigate to event detail or feedback entry for the completed attended event
Observe feedback form availability and timing guidance for post-event window
Fill valid answers and submit
Confirm success state with timestamp or completion indicator
cases.expected: Feedback form is enabled per AC-08a; submission shows immediate success confirmation per NFR-13; system marks feedback completion per Flow 5 step 3

cases.title: Participant updates feedback answers within window when updates allowed
preconditions: Event Completed with active feedback window
Event rule config permits in-window feedback updates per BR-16
Participant has existing feedback submission within window
steps: Submit updated answers for same registration within feedback window
Read persisted feedback answers and submittedAt
cases.expected: Update succeeds without FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE per AC-08e; latest answers stored; participant retains ability to refine feedback before window closes

cases.title: Feedback submission rejected before feedbackOpenAt
preconditions: Event Completed with Attended registration
Fixed clock now strictly before feedbackOpenAt (post-event but window not yet open)
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit with valid answers before window open
Verify no feedback row is created
cases.expected: Rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED (HTTP 422) per AC-08b; no feedback persisted; participant cannot submit before allowed window opens

cases.title: Feedback submission rejected after feedbackCloseAt
preconditions: Event Completed with Attended participant
Fixed clock now strictly after feedbackCloseAt
No prior feedback submission for the registration
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit with valid answers after window close
cases.expected: Submission rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per AC-08b; no feedback row persisted; mandatory feedback not completed within window per BR-18 downstream impact

cases.title: POST feedback outside configured window returns HTTP 422 FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED
preconditions: Completed event with feedback window not yet open or already closed
Participant JWT for Attended registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with valid answers while current time is outside window
Parse error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per AC-08b; response includes requestId; no feedbackId returned; FR-19 window constraint enforced at API boundary

cases.title: Non-Attended registration cannot submit post-event feedback
preconditions: Event Completed with feedback window active
Registration in Registered, CheckedIn, or Absent state (not Attended)
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit with valid answers for non-Attended registration
Verify no feedback row is created
cases.expected: Submission rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per AC-08c; participant cannot submit feedback until attendance is finalized to Attended

cases.title: Participant without valid registration cannot submit feedback
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window
Authenticated participant with no registration or cancelled registration for the event
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit for eventId where actor has no valid registration holder relationship
cases.expected: Rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per BR-15; only valid registration holders may submit feedback

cases.title: Duplicate official feedback submission returns FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE
preconditions: Attended participant already submitted one official feedback for the event within window
Event rule config does not allow in-window updates
steps: Submit feedback successfully once
Attempt second feedbackService.submit with different answers for same registration
cases.expected: Second attempt rejected with FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE (HTTP 409) per AC-08d; original feedback row unchanged per one-official-feedback policy

cases.title: Empty answers object rejected with INVALID_INPUT at API boundary
preconditions: Valid Attended registration and open feedback window on Completed event
Request payload with answers: {}
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with empty answers object
cases.expected: Rejected with INVALID_INPUT (HTTP 400) per AC-08g; no feedback persisted

cases.title: Organizer cannot submit feedback on behalf of participant
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window and Attended participant
OrganizerAdmin JWT (no Participant role for target registration)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with organizer token and participant registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per AC-08f; only Participant role may submit own feedback per permission matrix

cases.title: Unauthenticated feedback POST returns HTTP 401
preconditions: Completed event with open feedback window
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated per AC-08f; no feedback row created

cases.title: Participant cannot submit feedback for another participant's registration
preconditions: Completed event with two Attended participants A and B
Active feedback window
Authenticated as participant A
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit using participant B's registrationId while authenticated as A
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per AC-08f; FR-26 scope constraint enforced — participant operates only on own registration data

cases.title: Concurrent duplicate feedback submits for same registration produce single official record
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window
Attended participant with no prior feedback
Two parallel feedbackService.submit calls with identical registrationId
steps: Launch two concurrent submit requests with different answers payloads
Query feedback_submissions for the registration after both settle
cases.expected: Exactly one feedback row persisted; one request succeeds with feedbackId; other returns FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE (HTTP 409) per AC-08d; no duplicate official feedback per BR-16

cases.title: Successful feedback submission returns immediate success payload
preconditions: Attended participant within feedback window on Completed event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with valid payload
Inspect response latency and body
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 200 with feedbackId and submittedAt per AC-08a; client receives actionable success without polling; satisfies NFR-13 immediate feedback on critical participant action

cases.title: Rejected feedback submission returns deterministic error code and message
preconditions: Completed event with feedback window closed or not yet open
Participant JWT for Attended registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback outside window
Parse error envelope
Repeat identical request
cases.expected: Response includes error.code FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per AC-08b, user-safe message, and requestId per standard error contract; same inputs produce same error code on repeat

cases.title: Feedback window validation is deterministic under fixed clock
preconditions: Fixed clock abstraction per testing plan deterministic controls
Identical Completed event, Attended registration, and answers fixtures across runs
steps: Run in-window feedback submit scenario twice with identical inputs and clock
Compare outcomes including feedbackId presence and error codes on out-of-window variant
cases.expected: Both runs accept or reject consistently with same error codes; no flakiness from timing; core scenario matrix Feedback in allowed window row is stable

cases.title: Feedback form shows clear blocking reason when post-event window is closed
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on Completed event
Feedback window closed (after feedbackCloseAt)
steps: Navigate to event detail or feedback entry
Attempt to access or submit feedback form
cases.expected: Form disabled or submission blocked with concrete message (e.g. feedback period ended) per AC-08b; not a generic error identifier in user-facing text per microcopy standards

cases.title: FeedbackSubmitted domain event emitted on successful participant submit
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window
Attended participant with no prior feedback
Domain event listener or outbox capture enabled in test harness
steps: Submit feedback via feedbackService.submit with valid answers
Inspect emitted domain events or outbox records
cases.expected: FeedbackSubmitted event recorded with eventId, registrationId, feedbackId, and submittedAt per AC-08a; enables downstream eligibility evaluation per Workflow E

cases.title: Feedback submission rejected when event is not Completed
preconditions: Event in Published or InProgress state (not Completed)
Attended or CheckedIn registration with active feedback window timestamps configured
Authenticated participant with valid registration
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit with valid answers while event state is not Completed
Verify no feedback row is created
cases.expected: Submission rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per FR-19 event-state gate and BR-15; feedback only permitted after event transitions to Completed

cases.title: Cross-participant feedback POST returns HTTP 403
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window
Two Attended participants A and B with separate registrations
Participant A JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with participant A token and registrationId belonging to participant B
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per AC-08f; no feedback row created for B; FR-26 own-registration scope enforced at API boundary
